case_title: A GORDON ATKINSON VS. ERIC ROUSSEL

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTNUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JULY 21, 2021 AT 3:30PM IN DEPARTMENT 506, 400 MCALLISTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102.
REMARK: REJECT-SC-104 - IMPROPER SERVICE; SUBSTITUTE SERVICE IS MARKED BUT STATES WAS LEFT IN MAILBOX NOT GIVEN TO AN ACTUAL PERSON.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-15-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF A. GORDON ATKINSON PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIC ROUSSEL IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2021 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAR-05-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF A GORDON ATKINSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIC ROUSSEL IS NOT PRESENT. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED AT THIS TIME. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-19-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF A GORDON ATKINSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIC ROUSSELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INFORMS THE COURT THAT HE WAS NOT SERVED. THE COURT VIOR DIRS THE PARTIES ON SERVICE AND FINDS IT IS IMPROPER. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 15, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,783.00 FILED BY ATKINSON, A GORDON AS TO DEFENDANT ROUSSEL, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NOT LISTED); REMARKS: NO ANSWER. ONLY PROVIDED WITH ENOUGH TIM TO MSKE TWO ATTEMPTS. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CONTINUANCE WAS ISSUED ON MARCH 11, 2021. DOCUMENTS WERE FILED WITH THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S OFFICE CIVIL SECTION ON JUNE 29, 2021. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATKINSON, A GORDON AS TO DEFENDANT ROUSSEL, ERIC

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) **PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEEMED INVALID BY THE COURT AT THE EHARING ON MARCH 5, 2021** SERVED FEB-01-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROUSSEL, ERIC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED.(506)
